name: Play From Hand - Two Hand Cards
description: Proof-of-concept editable scenario that starts from a known fixture and swaps two cards in player one's hand so a regression can validate a short in-turn sequence of hand plays.

champion.description: Card ID to replace the champion on the field. Replaces whichever CHAMPION card is currently on myField. Omit to keep the default fixture champion.

element.description: Spirit element for the champion lineage: fire, water, or wind. Replaces the champion's spirit subcard. Omit to keep the default fixture spirit.

handCard.description: Card ID to place into player one's hand at myHand-2 before the draft test starts.

secondHandCard.description: Card ID to place into player one's hand at myHand-3 before the draft test starts.
